stages.objective: Observe baseline persistence behavior before latency tuning.
stages.goal: Capture baseline evidence for timing and correctness checks.
stages.theory_detail: Latency impacts event timing, but correctness conditions should remain stable.

hints.concept: Comparative analysis requires stable reference run.
hints.explicit: Run baseline once and note fs_ok/completion before tuning.

stages.objective: Diagnose timing differences without conflating correctness.
stages.goal: Pass required checks while explaining observed latency effects.

hints.nudge: Separate timing changes from correctness status.
hints.concept: Longer completion time does not imply invariant failure.
hints.explicit: Compare trace timing and confirm fs_ok remains true.

stages.objective: Tune latency and preserve invariant/completion requirements.
stages.goal: Use bounded config edits and keep all checks passing.

hints.concept: Controlled tuning isolates timing effects safely.
hints.explicit: Apply one change, rerun, and submit when fs_ok + completion validators pass.
